allow:
Bash(CLAUDE_COMMIT_APPROVED=true git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: exec summary region chart to table, add commit approval rules

- Replace pie chart with clean table for Impacts by Region (better for long names)
- Add spacer to align table container with adjacent charts
- Format Daily Impacts date axis as single-line (%d %b)
- Move (000s) from titles to y-axis labels for consistency
- Add media_owner_names to campaign summary for full list display
- Add commit approval rules to CLAUDE.md and pre-commit hook
- Pre-commit hook now blocks non-interactive commits without CLAUDE_COMMIT_APPROVED=true

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: ian@route.org.uk
EOF
)")

Bash(CLAUDE_COMMIT_APPROVED=true git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
perf: add denormalized MVs for 9x faster frame audience queries

- Create mv_frame_audience_daily (3.2M rows) with pre-joined frame details
- Create mv_frame_audience_hourly (46M rows) with pre-joined frame details
- Update queries to use denormalized MVs (3.8ms vs 33ms)
- Add SQL LIMIT to queries for fast initial load (2000 rows default)
- Add pagination UI with "Load All Records" button
- Add CSV/Excel download buttons for full dataset export
- Remove redundant success boxes from UI
- Update ARCHITECTURE.md with performance optimization docs

Performance improvements:
- Daily queries: 33ms → 3.8ms (9x faster)
- Initial page load: fetches 2000 rows via SQL LIMIT
- Tab switching: cached with @st.cache_data (1hr TTL)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: ian@route.org.uk
EOF
)")

Bash(CLAUDE_COMMIT_APPROVED=true git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
docs: add MV frame audience fix documentation

- Update ARCHITECTURE.md with route_release_id join logic explanation
- Add pipeline-handover MV fix document with full SQL recreation scripts
- Document why join must use release_number = ''R'' || route_release_id::text

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: ian@route.org.uk
EOF
)")
